_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Monitor and report client-level computer system performance.
reference_document_element_description: Implement platform monitoring and alerting for availability, performance, cost, and security events, with defined escalation procedures.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DA domain. DA-T-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-004 (AI, cosine: 0.506), TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.506).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.9/10 (raw 0.491). Shared vocabulary: [performance]. DCWF-only terms [client, computer, level, monitor, report, system] vs WIDAI-only terms [alerting, availability, cost, defined, escalation, events] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.886 (P=0.903, R=0.870). P exceeds R by 0.033 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 16 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Monitor and report client-level computer system performance." and "Implement platform monitoring and alerting for availability, performance, cost," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.513 ≈ STS 0.491 (gap 0.022). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [performance] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.5%. Shared tokens: [performance]. DCWF-only: [client, computer, level, monitor, report, system]. WIDAI-only: [alerting, availability, cost, defined, escalation, events].
